item.title: Move populate-mode docs and claudemd snippet to files
item.intent: Static documentation blocks are read from files, not constructed as bash string literals. build_agent_prompt loses ~90 lines of inline text.
item.description: build_agent_prompt has ~74 lines of populate-mode documentation inlined as a bash string. get_claudemd_snippet has 15 lines. Move populate docs to the end of agents/product-owner.md (gated by a section header the orchestrator includes only in populate mode). Move claudemd snippet to templates/claude-section.md. Both become cat calls.
steps: Append populate-mode documentation to .aishore/agents/product-owner.md under a clear section header
Update build_agent_prompt to conditionally include the populate section from the prompt file instead of injecting it
Replace get_claudemd_snippet body with cat of the template file
Verify: run a dry-run with populate mode and confirm prompt content is identical
acceptanceCriteria: Zero lines of populate documentation exist as bash string literals in aishore
templates/claude-section.md exists and get_claudemd_snippet reads it
Dry-run developer prompt output is unchanged
